name: pgcli
description: PostgreSQL CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting — interactive psql replacement with smart completions for tables, columns, and functions
when_to_use: Interactive PostgreSQL querying, exploring schemas, running ad-hoc queries with better ergonomics than psql

install.command: pip install pgcli || brew install pgcli

name: mycli
description: MySQL/MariaDB CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting — interactive mysql replacement with smart completions
when_to_use: Interactive MySQL/MariaDB querying with better ergonomics than the default mysql client

install.command: pip install mycli || brew install mycli

name: litecli
description: SQLite CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting — interactive sqlite3 replacement with smart completions for tables and columns
when_to_use: Interactive SQLite querying and schema exploration with better ergonomics than sqlite3

install.command: pip install litecli || brew install litecli

name: dbmate
description: Lightweight database migration tool — framework-agnostic SQL migrations for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and ClickHouse
when_to_use: Managing database schema migrations in any project without ORM dependencies — pure SQL migration files

name: Atlas
description: Modern database schema management tool — declarative migrations with schema diffing, linting, and drift detection for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and more
when_to_use: Declarative schema management, automatic migration generation from schema diffs, schema linting and CI integration

install.command: brew install ariga/tap/atlas || curl -sSfL https://atlasgo.sh | sh

name: Sqitch
description: Database change management system — dependency-aware migrations without ORM, using native SQL scripts and a plan file
when_to_use: Complex database migration workflows requiring dependency ordering, revert capabilities, and cross-database support

name: Flyway
description: Version-controlled database migration tool — convention-based SQL and Java migrations with baseline support for existing databases
when_to_use: JVM-based projects needing database version control, or any project wanting mature, battle-tested SQL migrations

install.command: brew install flyway || curl -sL https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/flywaydb/flyway-commandline/10.0.0/flyway-commandline-10.0.0-linux-x64.tar.gz | tar xz

name: Liquibase
description: Database schema change management — tracks, versions, and deploys database changes using XML, YAML, JSON, or SQL changelogs
when_to_use: Enterprise database migration management, multi-format changelog support, rollback capabilities, and pre-deploy validation

install.command: brew install liquibase || curl -L https://github.com/liquibase/liquibase/releases/latest/download/liquibase-4.x.tar.gz | tar xz
